info.title: WealthView API
info.description: Live Stellar wallet aggregation, Treasury Signals, and additive Treasury Intelligence endpoints. Outputs are calculated from wallet query results, not demo treasury values.

get.summary: Aggregate one or more Stellar wallets

parameters.name: wallets
parameters.description: Comma, space, or newline separated Stellar G... account IDs.

200.description: Aggregate, Treasury Signals, and Treasury Intelligence response

get.summary: Get Treasury Signals for wallet aggregate
Get Treasury Intelligence for wallet aggregate
Reserved for externally persisted snapshot history
